name: steadystate
description: Approve, decline, or inspect pending steadystate remediations

options.name: help
options.description: List the commands this listener accepts

options.name: targets
options.description: List the probe targets this listener knows

options.name: pending
options.description: Show remediations awaiting approval, with their fingerprints

options.name: probe
options.description: Scan a named target now and post what's wrong (read-only)

options.name: target
options.description: The named target to scan (from the listener's targets file)

options.name: verbose
options.description: Show the full evidence per finding (why + declared/observed)

options.name: cost
options.description: Add the per-caller LLM spend breakdown for this probe

options.name: unmute
options.description: Show muted/snoozed findings too (bypass suppression for this run)

options.name: cost
options.description: Show LLM spend -- a rollup, or a day/week trend

options.name: period
options.description: Bucket spend into a trend (default is a per-caller rollup)

options.name: findings
options.description: List remembered findings: fingerprint, status, severity

options.name: history
options.description: Show the remediation audit log (newest first)

options.name: mute
options.description: Silence a finding (e.g. a benign probe result) on future scans

options.name: fingerprint
options.description: The fingerprint shown under the finding

options.name: approve
options.description: Approve a pending remediation by fingerprint

options.name: fingerprint
options.description: The drift fingerprint shown on the alert

options.name: decline
options.description: Decline a pending remediation by fingerprint

options.name: fingerprint
options.description: The drift fingerprint shown on the alert
